comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-07 after the compact-widget slice. Net delta vs prior baseline (2,431,024 B): +68,876 B. Adds visible chat block for /compact and autocompact runs: src/agent/compact/{runId,widgetState,widgetController,liveControllerRegistry,terminalSnapshot,phaseSink}.ts + 3 React components (CompactWidget, CompactLiveBlock, CompactTerminalBlock) + Zod schema for terminal snapshot + phase-sink wiring through autocompact.ts and graph.ts. Replaces the post-hoc `banner: { kind: 'compact' }` chat record with a live progress widget that flips to a terminal snapshot on done/error/cancel. Cap reset to 30 KB for incremental tuning on top.
